backend/main.mo: Main Motoko actor for the Higgins Music Hub backend, defining all core data types (Membership, PublishingWork, Release, RecordingProject, ArtistDevelopment) and mixing in storage, authorization, and user approval modules.
feature_evidence.json: Empty feature evidence report JSON file with no recorded features.
frontend-file-summaries.txt: Text file containing JSON summaries of all frontend source files, describing the purpose and key changes for each hook, component, and page in the portal.
frontend/index.css: Global stylesheet that imports Tailwind directives and defines CSS custom properties for light and dark theme color tokens (background, foreground, primary, sidebar, chart colors, etc.).
frontend/index.html: Minimal HTML entry point for the Higgins Music app that mounts a React root div and loads the main TypeScript module.
frontend/ROLL_OUT_21_7_EXECUTION_LOG.md: Execution log recording timestamped evidence for the Rollout 21.7 (Step 9.5) deployment, covering TypeScript compilation, production build, backend upgrade, and post-upgrade verification.
frontend/ROLL_OUT_21_7_STEP_9_5_ARTIFACT: Companion artifact document for the Rollout 21.7 execution log, intended to store verbatim command outputs and build logs that are too long for the main log.
frontend/ROLLOUT_STEPS.md: Single source of truth document listing completed and remaining rollout steps for the Higgins Music Hub, with detailed checklists and acceptance criteria for mainnet deployment steps 10A and beyond.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_1_21_2.md: Post-upgrade smoke test checklist for Rollout 21.1–21.2, covering landing page load, authentication, all five portal detail routes, Edit Links dialogs, and both admin and non-admin user flows.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_3_21_4.md: Post-upgrade smoke test checklist for Rollout 21.3–21.4, mirroring the 21.1–21.2 checklist with a focus on frontend upgrade resilience and verifying detail routes and Edit Links dialogs for both user roles.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_5_21_6.md: Post-upgrade smoke test checklist for rollout 21.5–21.6 of the Higgins Music Hub, covering landing page load, authentication, all five portal detail routes, and 'Edit Links' dialogs for both admin and non-admin approved member roles.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_7_SESSION_LOG.md: Structured session log template for executing the rollout 21.7 smoke test, with fields for test user principals, entity IDs per route, console errors, and per-role pass/fail outcomes; partially pre-filled with placeholder test data.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_21_7.md: Post-upgrade smoke test checklist for rollout 21.7, similar in scope to 21.5–21.6 but adding explicit AuthGate/ApprovalGate verification steps and referencing a companion session log file for recording entity IDs and console output.
frontend/SMOKE_TEST_STEP_10_MAINNET.md: Comprehensive mainnet post-deployment smoke test checklist for Step 10, organized into three sections (10A pre-deployment verification, 10B backend upgrade verification, 10C frontend verification) with evidence fields for recording deployment artifacts and test results.
frontend/src/App.tsx: Defines the full client-side routing tree using TanStack Router, wrapping the app with QueryClient, ThemeProvider, and Toaster, with routes for landing, portal sections (memberships, publishing, releases, recordings, artists), and admin pages.
frontend/src/components/admin/PortalAudi: Admin-only component that displays a grouped, prioritized summary of incomplete or empty portal sections sourced from a portalAudit utility, rendered as cards with badge indicators.
frontend/src/components/auth/ApprovalGat: Wrapper component that is temporarily bypassed to always render children unconditionally, with the original membership-approval-check logic preserved in comments.
frontend/src/components/auth/AuthGate.ts: Route guard component that redirects unauthenticated users to the landing page and shows a spinner while Internet Identity is initializing or logging in.
frontend/src/components/auth/LoginButton: Button component that triggers Internet Identity login or logout, clears the React Query cache on sign-out, and handles the already-authenticated edge case.
frontend/src/components/auth/ProfileSetu: Modal dialog that prompts newly authenticated users without a profile to enter their name, email, and bio, then saves the profile via a mutation hook.
frontend/src/components/bulk/BulkDeleteC: Alert dialog component that asks the user to confirm bulk deletion of a specified count of entities, showing a loading spinner while the delete mutation is pending.
frontend/src/components/feedback/AccessD: Full-page centered card component that displays an access-denied message with a shield icon for unauthorized route access.
frontend/src/components/feedback/EmptySt: Centered empty-state UI component that accepts an optional icon, title, description, and an optional action button.
frontend/src/components/feedback/ErrorBa: Destructive alert banner that displays error messages, converting common backend error strings like 'Unauthorized' or 'not found' into user-friendly text.
frontend/src/components/feedback/Loading: Full-screen loading placeholder that renders a set of skeleton elements while content is being fetched.
frontend/src/components/feedback/Section: Renders a styled placeholder card for missing or incomplete portal sections, with visual priority levels (high/medium/low) indicated by icons, colors, and badges.
frontend/src/components/history/ChangeHi: Displays a timeline of change history events for a given record, showing operation type (create/update/link), timestamp, and actor, with loading/error/empty states.
frontend/src/components/layout/BrandHead: A sticky top header component showing the Higgins Music logo and name, with an optional login button controlled by the `showAuth` prop.
frontend/src/components/layout/PortalLay: Provides the authenticated portal shell with a responsive sidebar navigation, role-based menu filtering (admin-only items), and logout functionality.
frontend/src/components/related/EditLink: A simple outline button component that triggers an edit-links action, accepting an onClick handler and optional disabled state.
frontend/src/components/related/EditRela: A modal dialog for editing cross-entity relationships, presenting multi-select lists for memberships, artists, works, releases, and projects with loading/error handling and a save callback.
frontend/src/components/related/MultiSel: A filterable, scrollable checkbox list component for selecting multiple entities by ID, with a live search input and selected-count display.
frontend/src/components/related/relatedR: Provides permission-check functions to determine if the current user can edit a record or membership, based on principal ownership or admin status, with defensive handling for missing values.
frontend/src/components/related/RelatedR: Displays linked related records (memberships, artists, works, releases, projects) as navigable badges, resolving human-readable labels from caller-owned entities when available.
frontend/src/hooks/useActor.ts: Custom hook that creates and caches a backend actor instance using React Query, supporting both anonymous and authenticated (Internet Identity) usage, and invalidates dependent queries when the actor changes.
frontend/src/hooks/useCurrentUser.ts: Custom hook that fetches and exposes the current user's role and approval status from the backend actor, deriving convenience booleans like isAdmin and isApproved.
frontend/src/hooks/useInternetIdentity.t: Implements an Internet Identity authentication context and provider using DFINITY's AuthClient, exposing login/logout functions, identity state, and login status to child components.
frontend/src/hooks/useLinkableEntityOpti: Custom hook that fetches and formats entity options (memberships, artists, works, releases, projects) for linking, returning admin-scoped or caller-scoped data depending on the user's role.
frontend/src/hooks/useQueries.ts: Centralizes all React Query hooks for backend data fetching and mutations, covering user profiles, roles, approvals, memberships, publishing works, releases, recording projects, and artist development entities.
frontend/src/index.css: Global stylesheet that configures Tailwind CSS and defines a warm neutral CSS custom property color palette for both light and dark modes.
frontend/src/main.tsx: Application entry point that mounts the React app with QueryClientProvider and InternetIdentityProvider wrappers around the root App component.
frontend/src/pages/LandingPage.tsx: Public landing page for Higgins Music that displays a hero section, services overview, and co-operative membership info, redirecting authenticated users to the portal.
frontend/src/pages/portal/admin/AdminBoo: Admin-only page (guard currently disabled) that explains how to bootstrap the first administrator account using a secret token in the URL hash.
frontend/src/pages/portal/admin/AdminDas: Admin dashboard page (guard currently disabled) that displays aggregate stats and recent activity across memberships, publishing works, releases, recording projects, and artist development.
frontend/src/pages/portal/admin/RoleAssi: Admin page (guard currently disabled) for viewing all known users and assigning or changing their roles (admin, member, guest) via a dropdown table.
frontend/src/pages/portal/artists/Artist: Detail view for a single artist development entry, supporting inline editing of goals, plans, milestones, and notes, plus managing related entity links with permission checks.
List page for artist development entries that supports creating new entries via a dialog, bulk deletion, duplication, and row-level selection with admin vs. caller-scoped data.
frontend/src/pages/portal/label/ReleaseD: Detail page for a single music release, supporting inline editing of title, type, tracklist, key dates, and workflow checklist, plus managing linked entities and displaying change history.
frontend/src/pages/portal/label/Releases: List page for all releases showing a table with bulk-delete, duplicate, and create-new-release functionality, with admin vs. caller-scoped data views.
frontend/src/pages/portal/memberships/Me: Detail page for a single membership record, allowing inline editing of name, email, and status, managing linked entities, and showing change history.
List page for membership profiles with a table supporting bulk-delete, duplicate, and create-new-membership actions, scoped by admin or caller role.
frontend/src/pages/portal/publishing/Pub: Detail page for a publishing work record, supporting inline editing of title, registration status, contributors, ownership splits, and notes, plus linked entity management and change history.
List page for publishing works that supports creating, bulk-deleting, and duplicating works, with admin vs. caller-scoped data views and a creation dialog form.
frontend/src/pages/portal/recordings/Rec: Detail page for a single recording project with inline editing, permission checks, related entity linking, and a change history panel.
List page for recording projects supporting creation, bulk deletion, and duplication, with admin vs. caller-scoped data and a status-aware table display.
frontend/src/utils/arrays.ts: Provides utility functions for safe array normalization and length checks, guarding against undefined/null values from backend schema changes.
frontend/src/utils/portalAudit.ts: Defines a typed list of audit findings (missing or incomplete features) across portal sections, used by placeholder components and the admin dashboard audit summary.
frontend/src/utils/urlParams.ts: Utility functions for reading, persisting, and clearing URL parameters from both query strings and hash-based routes, with sessionStorage fallback support.
frontend/src/utils/validation.ts: Exports a single validation function that checks ownership split arrays for completeness and ensures percentages do not exceed 100%.
frontend/tailwind.config.js: Tailwind CSS configuration for the frontend, defining dark mode, content paths, custom theme tokens (colors via oklch CSS variables, fonts, border radius, shadows, animations), and plugins (typography, container-queries, animate).
frontend/UPGRADE_LINKING_VERIFICATION_RE: Results template for recording manual QA outcomes of upgrade-safe linking verification across multiple rollouts (21.1–21.2, 21.3–21.4, etc.), with checklists for build status, authentication, detail routes, and Edit Links dialogs per role.
frontend/UPGRADE_LINKING_VERIFICATION.md: Manual QA checklist for verifying upgrade-safe related-record linking across all five entity detail pages, covering 'Edit Links' dialog behavior and link persistence for both admin and non-admin member roles after a canister upgrade.
project_state.json: Project state metadata for Higgins Music Hub at schema version 1.0.0, tracking a single pending feature request (AR-1) to implement Part 2 Section 2 of the portal build continuing from Section 1.
